messages.content: 帮我以专业学术的语气润色这段话：在这次研究中，四种硅酸盐生物活性玻璃based on SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system通过常规的熔融冷淬法获得，其流程示意图如图3所示。首先，按照表4中预先设计好的玻璃化学组分计算出相应原料的需求量，并利用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China）精确称取。接着，将称好的原料置于陶瓷研钵中研磨30分钟以使其均匀混合。然后，将混合物料转移至铂金坩埚中，并将其置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai，China）中加热，设置升温速率为5℃/min，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，恒温保持2小时。之后，通过钢板冷压法迅速将熔融态的玻璃液淬冷，即可获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体样品。值得一说的是，在加热炉升温期间，为促使混合原料得到充分熔融，设置在900℃和1200℃时分别恒温保温30分钟。

In this study, four types of bioactive glasses based on the SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system were obtained through a conventional melt-quenching method, as illustrated in Figure 3. Firstly, the required amounts of corresponding raw materials were calculated based on the predetermined glass chemical compositions listed in Table 4 and accurately weighed using an electronic balance (AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China). Subsequently, the weighed raw materials were placed in a ceramic grinding bowl and homogeneously mixed for 30 minutes. Afterwards, the mixture was transferred to a platinum crucible and heated in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai, China) with a heating rate of 5℃/min. The temperature rise was stopped when the furnace chamber reached 1400℃, and the temperature was maintained for 2 hours. Then, the molten glass was rapidly quenched by a steel plate compression molding technique, resulting in transparent and homogeneous bioactive glass samples. It is worth mentioning that during the heating phase of the furnace, the temperatures of 900℃ and 1200℃ were maintained for 30 minutes each to ensure the complete melting of the mixed raw materials.

帮我以学术的语气润色这段话：在这次研究中，四种硅酸盐生物活性玻璃based on SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system通过常规的熔融冷淬法获得，其流程示意图如图3所示。首先，按照表4中预先设计好的玻璃化学组分计算出相应原料的需求量，并利用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China）精确称取。接着，将称好的原料置于陶瓷研钵中研磨30分钟以使其均匀混合。然后，将混合物料转移至铂金坩埚中，并将其置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai，China）中加热，设置升温速率为5℃/min，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，恒温保持2小时。之后，通过钢板冷压法迅速将熔融态的玻璃液淬冷，即可获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体样品。值得一说的是，在加热炉升温期间，为促使混合原料得到充分熔融，设置在900℃和1200℃时分别恒温保温30分钟。

In this study, four types of bioactive glasses based on the SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system were obtained using a conventional melt-quenching method, as shown in Figure 3. Firstly, the required amounts of raw materials were calculated based on the predetermined glass chemical compositions listed in Table 4 and accurately weighed using an electronic balance (AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China). Subsequently, the weighed raw materials were placed in a ceramic grinding bowl and homogenously mixed for 30 minutes. The mixture was then transferred to a platinum crucible and heated in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai, China), with a heating rate of 5℃/min. The heating rate was stopped when the temperature inside the furnace chamber reached 1400℃, and this temperature was maintained for 2 hours. Following this, the molten glass was rapidly quenched using a steel plate compression molding technique, resulting in transparent and homogeneous bioactive glass block samples. It is worth noting that during the heating phase of the furnace, the temperatures of 900℃ and 1200℃ were maintained for 30 minutes each to ensure the complete melting of the mixed raw materials.

帮我用中文学术润色这段话：在这次研究中，四种硅酸盐生物活性玻璃based on SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system通过常规的熔融冷淬法获得，其流程示意图如图3所示。首先，按照表4中预先设计好的玻璃化学组分计算出相应原料的需求量，并利用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China）精确称取。接着，将称好的原料置于陶瓷研钵中研磨30分钟以使其均匀混合。然后，将混合物料转移至铂金坩埚中，并将其置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai，China）中加热，设置升温速率为5℃/min，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，恒温保持2小时。之后，通过钢板冷压法迅速将熔融态的玻璃液淬冷，即可获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体样品。值得一说的是，在加热炉升温期间，为促使混合原料得到充分熔融，设置在900℃和1200℃时分别恒温保温30分钟。

在本研究中，通过常规的熔融冷淬法成功获得了四种基于SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5四元系统的硅酸盐生物活性玻璃。研究过程如图3所示。首先，根据事先设计好的玻璃化学组分，在表4中计算出相应原料的需求量，并使用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (上海) 环球实验耗材有限公司，中国）进行精确称重。然后，将称好的原料置于陶瓷研钵中进行30分钟的研磨，以确保原料的均匀混合。接下来，将混合物转移到铂金坩埚中，并置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, 上海，中国）中进行加热，升温速率设置为每分钟5℃，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，并保持恒温2小时。随后，通过钢板冷压法，迅速将熔融态的玻璃液进行淬冷，从而获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体样品。值得一提的是，在加热炉升温期间，分别在900℃和1200℃时设置恒温保温30分钟，以确保混合原料得到充分熔融。
翻译：上海贵尔机械设备有限公司
Shanghai Guier Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd.

以专业学术的形式翻译：在这次研究中，四种硅酸盐生物活性玻璃based on SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system通过常规的熔融冷淬法获得，其制备过程如图3所示。首先，按照表4中预先设计好的玻璃化学组分计算出相应原料的需求量，并利用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China）精确称重。然后，将称好的原料置于陶瓷研钵中研磨30分钟。接下来，将均匀混合的原料缓慢转移至铂金坩埚中，并置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China）中进行加热，升温速率设置为5℃/min，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，并保持恒温2小时。随后，通过钢板冷压法迅速将熔融态的玻璃液淬冷，即可获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体。值得一提的是，在加热炉升温期间，为确保混合原料得到充分熔融，分别在900℃和1200℃时设置恒温保温30分钟。

In this study, four types of bioactive glasses based on the SiO2-CaO-Na2O-P2O5 quaternary system were obtained using a conventional melt-quenching method. The preparation process is illustrated in Figure 3. Firstly, the required amounts of raw materials were calculated based on the predetermined glass chemical compositions listed in Table 4, and accurately weighed using an electronic balance (AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China). Subsequently, the weighed raw materials were ground in a ceramic grinding bowl for 30 minutes. Next, the homogenously mixed raw materials were slowly transferred to a platinum crucible and heated in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China) with a heating rate of 5℃/min. The temperature rise was stopped when the temperature inside the furnace chamber reached 1400℃, and this temperature was maintained for 2 hours. Subsequently, the molten glass was rapidly quenched using a steel plate compression molding technique, resulting in transparent and homogeneous bioactive glass blocks. It is worth mentioning that during the heating phase of the furnace, the temperatures of 900℃ and 1200℃ were maintained for 30 minutes each to ensure the thorough melting of the mixed raw materials.
翻译：在那之后，将熔融的玻璃液迅速倒入模具，并通过钢板冷压法淬冷，最终获得透明均匀的生物活性玻璃块体。
Afterward, the molten glass was poured into molds and rapidly cooled through a steel plate compression method, resulting in the production of transparent and homogeneous bioactive glass blocks.

翻译：首先，按照表4中预先设计好的玻璃化学组分计算出相应原料的需求量，并利用电子天平（AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China）精确称取。然后，将称取的原料置于陶瓷研钵中研磨30分钟以使其混合均匀。接下来，将物料缓慢转移至铂金坩埚中，并置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China）中进行加热

Firstly, the required amounts of raw materials were calculated based on the predetermined glass chemical compositions listed in Table 4, and accurately weighed using an electronic balance (AUW220D, Shimadzu (Shanghai) Global Laboratory Consumables Co., Ltd., China). Subsequently, the weighed raw materials were placed in a ceramic grinding bowl and homogeneously mixed for 30 minutes. Next, the mixed materials were slowly transferred to a platinum crucible and heated in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China).
翻译：接下来，将均匀混合的原料缓慢转移至铂金坩埚中，并置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China）中进行加热，升温速率设置为5℃/min，待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，并保持恒温2小时。

Next, the homogenously mixed raw materials were slowly transferred to a platinum crucible and placed in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China). The heating rate was set at 5℃/min, and the temperature rise was stopped when the temperature inside the furnace chamber reached 1400℃. The temperature was then maintained at a constant level for 2 hours.
翻译：接下来，将均匀混合的原料缓慢转移至铂金坩埚中，并置于高温热处理电炉（GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China）中进行加热，升温速率设置为5℃/min。待炉腔内温度达到1400℃时停止升温，保温2小时。

Next, the homogenously mixed raw materials were gradually transferred to a platinum crucible and placed in a high-temperature heat treatment furnace (GR.LF12/28, Shanghai Guier Machinery and Equipment Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China) for heating. The heating rate was set at 5℃/min. The temperature rise was stopped when the temperature inside the furnace chamber reached 1400℃, and it was maintained at that temperature for 2 hours.
